accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for all audio and video media

accommodations.text: Repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request.
accommodations.source_quote: repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request

accommodations.text: Seat with a clear line of sight to the speaker's face.
accommodations.source_quote: clear line of sight to the speaker's face

accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: additional wait time for verbal responses

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on tests and long assignments.
accommodations.source_quote: 50% extended time on tests and long assignments

accommodations.text: Provide 25% extended time on timed assessments.
Provide a visual schedule for each class period.
accommodations.source_quote: visual schedule for each class period

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy 30 minutes twice weekly
Speech and language therapy 30 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.
goals.source_quote: use a checklist to organize materials for each class

goals.text: Aanya will write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence and correct capitalization in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Writes two related sentences with inconsistent capitalization.
goals.target: Five-sentence paragraph with topic sentence in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence

goals.text: Jamal will answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Sustains attention for 3 minutes in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes
